/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/mock_agent_server.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/mock_agent_server.dir/mock_server.cpp.o -o mock_agent_server  /usr/lib/libdrogon.so.1.9.11 /usr/lib/libspdlog.so.1.17.0 /usr/lib/libtrantor.so.1.5.23 /usr/lib/libjsoncpp.so /usr/lib/libyaml-cpp.so.0.9.0 /usr/lib/libfmt.so.12.1.0
